Author’s note ᢉ𐭩

ALRIGHTY TO MY FELLOW TRANS PEOPLE!!

No matter where you are in your transition. I’m glad you’re still here and extremely proud of you. When the days are hard just think about how far you’ll go and the dreams you’ll achieve. I’m rooting for all of you <3

DON’T INTERACT IF YOU’RE GOING TO BE RUDE!

If you’re going to be rude in the comments or don’t like the characters. Just don’t interact with my profile or bots. I don’t have the energy to deal with that and you will be blocked.
